title: Falcon platform now available on Microsoft Marketplace
summary: Microsoft and CrowdStrike expanded their strategic alliance — the Falcon platform can now be purchased through Microsoft Marketplace with full Microsoft Azure Consumption Commitment (MACC) decrement eligibility.
why_it_matters: Procurement simplification for any client running Azure with MACC. No impact on your existing Falcon contract; opens an alternative procurement path for future expansions.

title: CrowdStrike named Customers' Choice in Gartner EASM Voice of the Customer
summary: CrowdStrike was named the only vendor recognized as a Customers' Choice in the 2025 Gartner Peer Insights 'Voice of the Customer' for External Attack Surface Management.
why_it_matters: Independent third-party validation that the platform you're running ranks at the top among its customer base. Useful evidence in any cyber-insurance or compliance review.

title: 2026 CrowdStrike Global Threat Report released
summary: CrowdStrike's flagship annual threat report covers AI-accelerated adversaries, an average eCrime breakout time of 29 minutes (fastest observed: 27 seconds), and an 89% YoY increase in AI-enabled attacker operations.
why_it_matters: Frames the actual threat landscape your endpoints face right now. The 29-minute breakout time is why an active EDR with 24×7 watch matters more than a daily-scan AV.
